description_text: Product Description Specifications: High quality plastic, strong and wear resistant, durable Compact and lightweight, easy to install and stable Glossy surface make it also great for decoration, looks more cool Material: PP Color: Carbon Fiber Look Size: As shown Applicable Model: Universal Package Include: 2* Car Rear Bumper Shovels 6* Screws Note: Due to the hand measurement, there have size error about 1-2cm. Item color displayed in photos may be showing slightly different since monitors are not calibrated same. Shipping Returns Contact Us All items will be checked before packing. All items are new and high quality. Item will be shipped within 1-3 business days upon receipt of payment, excluding weekends and public holidays. If to USA/AU/UK/GE, we will ship your order by SpeedPAK Standard, it will take about 8-12 business days to you, and you can track it on line. If to other country, we will ship your order by China Post or Other Registered Air Mail, it will take about 14-28 business days to you, you aslo can track it on line. Delivery time may take up to 8 weeks to some European countries & South American countries. We offer combined shipping discount on Shipping & Handling. Please note that some countries will have custom duty or tax for certain items. It is the buyer's responsibility to pay all endued custom duty or tax. We are not responsible for any custom duty or tax since our price do not include this charge.
